title: epimedium pinnatum subsp. orientale
intro: Epimedium pinnatum subsp. orientale, also known as barboris or fairy wings, is a species of flowering plant in the family Berberidaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Epimedium pinnatum subsp. orientale include improved cardiovascular health, increased libido, and enhanced bone density, making it a popular herbal remedy for menopause and osteoporosis. Herbal preparations of Epimedium pinnatum subsp. orientale may be found in capsule or tincture form, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
